widgets_values:
a red panda on a rooftop
a golden retriever on the beach
a fox in a winter forest
a cat watching the rain
an owl at dusk

properties.text:
One prompt per line. The seed selects a line via sha256(seed:node_id) — same seed always gives the same line, each node instance picks independently.

Tip: share the seed input with your KSampler for fully reproducible prompt/image pairs. Multiple instances of this node in the same workflow each pick independently even with the same seed — no need for different seeds per list.
